title: My Boss Bajrangbali
subTitle: A corrupt politician kills Anji's parents and plans to demolish a temple. Later, Lord Hanuman takes human form to help Anji fight the politician.

title: Das Ki Dhamkee
subTitle: Bizarre circumstances surround a waiter who is asked to pretend as the late owner of the pharmaceutical company, as he is his doppelganger.

title: Dharam Adhikari
subTitle: Dharamraj, a righteous man, manages his village's affairs justly, making him well-liked among the people. Irked by his popularity, a jealous Chaudhary and Shastri conspire to get rid of him.

title: Mufti
subTitle: Gana, a police officer, must go undercover to find and kill Bhairathi Ranagal, a crime lord. However, when he realises that Bhairathi's intentions are good, he needs to decide his next step.

title: Cadaver
subTitle: When two surgeons mysteriously get murdered by Vetri, a prisoner, the responsibility of locating his accomplice falls on the shoulders of a pathologist.

title: Gajaana
subTitle: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.

title: Seetharama Kalyana
subTitle: Arya, a righteous man, falls in love with a small-town woman named Geetha, unaware of the obstacles that lie ahead for both of them.

title: Garam
subTitle: Varala, a jobless young man, leaves his home to prove himself to his father. However, before achieving his goal, he falls in love with Sameera and tries to woo and save her from gangster Biju.

title: Main hoon Surya Singham 2
subTitle: An undercover police officer works in a school and tries to put an end to the criminal activities of two criminals who rule the area.

title: Super Khiladi Returns
subTitle: Guru hatches several plans to separate Priya and her lover Thirukumaran. However, Thirukumaran successfully manages to escape from Guru's evil plans and traps him in another problem.

title: Super Khiladi Returns
subTitle: Guru hatches several plans to separate Priya and her lover Thirukumaran. However, Thirukumaran successfully manages to escape from Guru's evil plans and traps him in another problem.

title: Inteqam
subTitle: When Birju's sister, Chhaya, is raped and the court fails to mete out justice, his parents die due to the shock. Birju sets out to seek revenge and kidnaps Dinanath's sister.

title: Khakee
subTitle: A deputy commissioner and his crew attempt to transport a terrorist to Mumbai, but their mission is thwarted by an ex-policeman with an agenda of his own.

title: Ram Ki Jung
subTitle: Ram does not believe in everlasting love and this ideology does not go down well with Jaanu. When Abhishek, a police officer, asks him the reason, he tells him about Rooba, his former lover.

title: Indian Soldier Never On Holiday
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Alluri
subTitle: Iqbal, an aspiring police candidate, embarks on a journey to follow in the footsteps of Alluri, an upright officer, and discovers valuable lessons along the way.

title: Dumdaar Khiladi 2
subTitle: Balu grows up without the love of a family due to his parents' untimely death. Later, he decides to establish a firm to help people like himself receive the affection they missed out on.

title: Vijay Raghavan
subTitle: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his locality. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: The Family Star
subTitle: Govardhan, a diligent architect, longs for a partner who understands his commitment to his large family. When Indu, a new tenant, moves in, his life starts to unfold in a new direction.

title: The Secret Agent
subTitle: In 1977, a tech expert flees a mysterious past and returns to Recife, seeking peace, but the city proves no calm sanctuary for him there.

title: The Secret Agent
subTitle: In 1977, a tech expert flees a mysterious past and returns to Recife, seeking peace, but the city proves no calm sanctuary for him there.

title: Nafrat Ki Jung
subTitle: Nafrat Ki Jung

title: Mission Aazaad
subTitle: Journalist Anjali forces Azad, a simple man, to take it upon himself to fight against terrorism. Azad initially refuses, but later agrees when he himself becomes a victim of terrorism.

title: Thadam
subTitle: While investigating the death of a man, the police track down their lead suspect. However, the case takes a twisted turn when they discover a clone of their suspect.

title: Kshatriya Ek Yodha
subTitle: An orphan pretends to love a girl in order to help his friend. However, he genuinely falls in love with her and tries to confess his feelings for her.

title: The Masterpiece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Custody
subTitle: A police constable's life takes a drastic turn when he is entrusted with producing a criminal in court. While the mobster remains under his custody, Shiva must dodge every threat to keep him alive.

title: Pogaru
subTitle: A local thug stands up against the atrocities committed on common people and fights to secure justice for them, thus earning the public's respect and affection.

title: Gally Rowdy
subTitle: A young man tries to find a balance between his love interest and friends. Meanwhile, his friends convince him to stay rowdy.

title: Naa Saami Ranga
subTitle: A man gains great notoriety in his village for his unmatched strength and brutal nature, which makes him a target of antisocial elements with a ruthless agenda.

title: Laila O Laila
subTitle: After his post-graduate studies, Karthik takes a holiday in Europe. On his return journey, he falls in love at first sight with Nandana, and goes to great lengths to win her heart.
